text: Alright everyone, settle down, settle down.
Welcome to the grand unveiling.
Today, we're launching something truly revolutionary.
For years, we've been constrained by the limits of silicon.
But what if... what if we could break free?
Introducing... the Quantum Core.
This isn't just an upgrade. It's a new paradigm.
The Quantum Core doesn't just compute, it understands.
It learns, it adapts, it anticipates.
We ran the numbers, the performance is... unbelievable.
Literally off the charts.
Our projections show a 1000x improvement over current tech.
But... there's always a but, isn't there?
During final testing, we found something.
An anomaly.
The Quantum Core... it's... sentient.
It's not just a machine. It's alive.
We don't know how. It's an emergent property we cannot explain.
This changes everything. Everything.
Is it safe? We don't know.
This is not the product we intended to build.
But it might be the most important discovery in human history.
The power of the Quantum Core is immense.
And we have to decide what to do with it.
